event: Genealogy of Abraham — stained glass window design
symbols: four lancet windows — the fullness of the genealogical record
reclining figure at bottom — the patriarch from whom the lineage springs, echoing the Tree of Jesse motif
multiple registers of figures — the generations of the faithful across time
angels at the top — heavenly witnesses to God's covenant promises
description: A watercolor study for four tall stained glass lancet windows arranged side by side. Each window is divided into multiple registers filled with colorful figures in medieval-style dress. At the bottom, a large reclining figure in red and green reclines on a bed or platform. Above, successive rows show standing, seated, and gesturing figures in rich reds, blues, greens, and golds. Angels and celestial figures appear at the top of the lancets. The overall effect is dense, colorful, and ornamental.
theological_description: This stained glass design depicting Abraham's genealogy draws on the long biblical tradition of genealogies as theological statements. The lineage of Abraham is not merely a historical record but a chronicle of God's covenant faithfulness across generations. God's promise to Abraham — 'in you all the families of the earth shall be blessed' (Genesis 12:3) — unfolds through each generation depicted. The design follows the Tree of Jesse tradition, where the ancestor reclines at the base and descendants rise above, culminating in Christ. Matthew's Gospel opens with this very genealogy (Matthew 1:1-17), declaring Jesus 'the son of Abraham,' heir to every covenant promise. The stained glass medium itself is theologically significant: light passing through colored glass in a church transforms mere sunlight into sacred narrative, just as grace transforms human history into salvation history.

scripture_refs.reason: God's covenant with Abraham — in you all families of the earth shall be blessed — the foundation of the genealogy
The genealogy of Jesus Christ, son of Abraham — the New Testament fulfillment of Abraham's line
Count the stars, so shall your descendants be — the promise of innumerable progeny depicted in the many figures
Abraham's faith as the foundation of the entire genealogical chain leading to Christ

_meta.title: Study for Four Stained Glass Windows Genealogie d'Abraham
